description_long: This house features a long, rectangular main structure with a prominent gable roof and a smaller, attached section with its own gable roof. The exterior is painted a muted blue with white trim around the windows and doors, giving it a classic suburban appearance. Multiple windows are evenly spaced along the main facade, and a set of stairs leads up to a small porch at the main entrance. The property includes a mix of paved and grassy areas, with the house set back from the street. The roof is dark gray and appears to be made of asphalt shingles, while the foundation and steps are likely concrete. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and practical living space.
description: A blue, single-story house with a gable roof, white-trimmed windows, and a small porch with steps, set on a lot with both grass and pavement.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with steps leading up to a small porch, several windows, and the long side of the house.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the length of the house, the attached section, and the paved area behind the building.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the secondary entrance, porch, and the connection between the main and smaller sections.
description_view_3: The side view reveals the gable end of the house, additional windows, and the transition between the grassy and paved areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps leading to a small porch, simple door, and minimal decorative elements.
